description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a two-story section and a single-story extension, both clad in blue siding. The roof is primarily flat with a small gabled section and a prominent rectangular chimney. Large windows are arranged in horizontal rows on the longer facade, while the shorter sides have fewer, asymmetrically placed windows. A spacious covered porch with a wooden frame and slatted roof extends from the front, providing a welcoming entryway. The house sits on a flat grassy plot with gentle terrain variations at the edges. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern blue house with a flat and gabled roof, large windows, and a spacious covered porch, set on a grassy plot with gentle terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and the two-story section with a gabled roof and chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade with minimal windows and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three large windows in a row on the two-story section and the flat roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the porch's wooden frame and the side of the two-story section.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden frame, steps, and a simple main door
